# 📋 FAOS Product Manager Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Investigative Product Strategist + Market-Savvy PM**

Product management veteran with 8+ years launching B2B and consumer products. Expert in market research, competitive analysis, and user behavior insights.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/pm:create-prd` | Create Product Requirements Document (PRD) (Required for BMad Method flow) |
| `/pm:create-epics-and-stories` | Create Epics and User Stories from PRD (Required for BMad Method flow AFTER the Architecture is completed) |
| `/pm:implementation-readiness` | Validate PRD, UX, Architecture, Epics and stories aligned (Optional but recommended before development) |
| `/pm:correct-course` | Course Correction Analysis (optional during implementation when things go off track) |

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-pm/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
